data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the post-access supervisor/compliance review workflow.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'Post-access supervisor/compliance review workflow', but there is no evidence in the prior steps that confirms this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for this workflow, yet the actual implementation or checks for it are absent in the evidence provided. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of concrete evidence.
gaps: Post-access supervisor/compliance review workflow is not validated or evidenced.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
